channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Violence and natural disasters dominate global headlines, with significant incidents reported in Cyprus, Norway, the US, and Lebanon.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Rising oil prices due to the US-Israel conflict with Iran are raising concerns about inflation and economic recovery globally.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Apple is set to launch high-end 'Ultra' products following the release of its low-cost MacBook Neo, indicating a shift in its product strategy.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: James Conner reworks his contract to stay with the Cardinals, while several college basketball coaches face firings after disappointing seasons.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from advancements in bridge monitoring to new insights into Alzheimer's and the genetic links between dogs and human behavior.
